high_priority_findings.finding: BOT OFFLINE DAY 75 — 62nd consecutive P0 flag. Zero live revenue. All 5 feedback loops frozen.
NEGATIVE KELLY EDGE (9th flag): Kelly=-0.167. WR=44.5% vs 52.4% needed. Every 100 trades = -$1,384 expected. Avg win $82.72 < avg loss $91.27.

high_priority_findings.finding: HYPE_SHORT_VETO_SPLIT (11th flag, AWAITING_HUMAN_APPROVAL): HYPE SHORT <75% conf = +$808 EV blocked. Real problem is >=75% (-$70.06/trade, n=77).
AUTO_FIX_STATE_INCONSISTENCY (NEW): Run 128 claimed TOD_MORNING_EDGE_DEACTIVATION as new fix but graduated_rules.json shows disabled by perpetual_improvement_run120 at 2026-06-22T03:06:08Z.

high_priority_findings.finding: CONFIDENCE MODEL DEGRADED (9th flag): 80-90% conf = 40.0% WR worst tier. Inverse correlation ~4pp WR degradation per confidence step.
HYPE LOSS DOMINANCE (6th flag): 68% of losses from HYPE. HYPE_SIZING_CAP_PROBE active (gate_20, 0.75x).
high_priority_findings.action: Validate HYPE_SIZING_CAP_PROBE on first 20 HYPE trades at restart.

high_priority_findings.finding: SHORT_DIRECTION_VETO_INVERSION (3rd flag): veto blocks SHORT (46.4% WR) in favor of LONG (39.5% WR). Probe active.
high_priority_findings.action: Deactivate short_direction_veto_v1 if SHORT WR >= LONG WR on n>=30 live trades.

high_priority_findings.finding: REGIME_AGENT UPGRADE: haiku→sonnet for REGIME_SHIFT events = $0.27/mo cost, $186/mo benefit (688x ROI).
NOISE STOP EPIDEMIC (3rd flag): 50.8% of SL hits in noise regime. 136 estimated noise SLs = -$14,814 recoverable.
